title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Program Defense
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for interaction resources, typed parts, conversation state, and retention and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named provider, network, identity, storage, sandbox, privacy, accessibility, load, cost, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for typed Gemini interaction and state ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements.

options.text: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for typed Gemini interaction and state ledger.
Server-side state is always cheaper and safer than application-managed state. That claim does not survive the state retention choice · changed case evidence boundary.

For state retention choice · changed case, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Interaction Resource
steps.instruction:
Order the Interaction Resource Safe AI agents and Python task-to-recovery evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Interaction Resource.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Interaction Resource assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Safe AI agents and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Interaction Resource, keep Interaction Resource connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.text: A quiz agent engineering team handles case 8507 during a controlled support-operations rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz State Retention Choice

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose stateless, provider-stateful, or application-stateful operation from privacy, deletion, audit, latency, cost, and recovery requirements.
